characters.description: %^2Character InformationSpeciesDemonGenderMale %^is one of the demons inThe Overlap. %^2 is a demon from the Overlap who makes his first appearance in Spawn Issue #19. He assists%^9with the monitoring of the Human species and is set on killing Houdini. He advises Houdini to use the portal to return to the Overlap, knowing that it will not work - and in Houdini's confusion, he will not have a chance to use alternate means to escape, and will perish in the explosion. He along with%^9report toThe Primeand advise whether or not an atomic detonation is enough to kill aHellspawn. %^2 is believed to have been killed when the atomic bombardment backfired into the Overlap.

%^2Character InformationSpeciesDemonGenderMale %^is one of the demons inThe Overlap. %^2 is a demon from the Overlap who makes his first appearance in Spawn Issue #19. He assists%^9with the monitoring of the Human species and is set on killing Houdini. He advises Houdini to use the portal to return to the Overlap, knowing that it will not work - and in Houdini's confusion, he will not have a chance to use alternate means to escape, and will perish in the explosion. He along with%^9report toThe Primeand advise whether or not an atomic detonation is enough to kill aHellspawn. %^2 is believed to have been killed when the atomic bombardment backfired into the Overlap.

%^9Character InformationSpeciesDemonGenderMale %^9is one of the demons inThe Overlap. %^9 is introduced in Spawn issue #19. This red-skinned creature inhabits The Overlap and is in charge of studying the atomics used by Earthians. Starting in 1945, at the end of World War II, the creatures of The Overlap discovered that atomics create extremely high heat scenarios which creates the theory that atomics can kill demons and scatter their infernal matter. To test this theory, %^9 had imbedded a “thought-program” intoYousef Volokhov, which would prompt him to detonate an atom bomb at a pre-set time, and Spawn would be caught at ground-zero – thus determining whether or not demons were susceptible. To ensure that Spawn was at the correct location, he had sent the Earthian Houdini as an agent, in hopes of killing the meddlesome man and getting 2 birds with 1 stone. As the plot played out in issue #20, Yousef had carried out his duties and engaged the bomb to explode. Luckily, just as the explosion was about to take place, Houdini was able to transport the bomb into The Overlap thus killing %^9 and a number of other creatures, as well as saving New York City and Spawn.

characters.name: Agent Connors
characters.description: Agent ConnorsCharacter InformationName of birthAgent ConnorsGenderMaleCurrent statusAliveBehind the ScenesCreated byTodd McFarlaneFirst appearanceSpawn #14 "Take the next left Twitch. Connors said there's usually a high density of them down that back way!" - Detective Sam Burke Connors is an NYPD agent who tips off Sam and Twitch about where a high volume of homeless usually resides in New York City in Spawn issue #14.

characters.name: Agent Roenick
characters.description: RoenickCharacter InformationName of birthRoenickGenderMaleKnown affiliationsJason WynnCurrent statusAliveBehind the ScenesCreated byTodd McFarlaneFirst appearanceSpawn #12 "Technically, you're clean...but I promise you, that won't last." - Agent Roenick Agent Roenick is an assistant toJason Wynnand a representative of theFederal Bureau of Investigation. He was placed in charge of the surveillance ofTerry Fitzgerald.[1]Despite this surveillance, nothing could be linked to Terry. Not to be made a fool of, Wynn ordered Agent Roenick to continue watching until he found something else. If nothing was found, then Roenick’s life would be in jeopardy – so the agent went to pay Fitzgerald a little visit. After some harsh words, the intimidating visit was over, and Terry was left in disbelief…his family was now at risk.

characters.name: Alberto
characters.description: AlbertoCharacter InformationSpeciesHumanGenderMale Albertois a character in the Violator miniseries. Alberto is first seen in issue #1. This large bodied man had just been hired as the new personal assistant of mobDon Tony Twist. Aside from the usual requests and duties, not much is seen of Alberto – but it is apparent that he is over-worked and under-appreciated. In issue #3 of the Violator miniseries, thePhlebiac Brothersgo on a rampage in a New York shopping mall, andViolatorchasesTony Twistand Alberto into the Gags R' Us outlet store. Out of sight, Tony places his signature sunglasses on Alberto, and when theViolatorbreaks through, he mistakes Alberto for his real target –Tony Twist(as they are very similar in height and weight). The realTonyis able to escape, while theViolator(thinking it's Tony) forces Alberto to dress up in a clown uniform to trick thePhlebiac Brothers. Alberto (who is mistaken by the ‘brothers' asClown) is prodded into the gateway toHelland his never heard from again.

characters.name: Amanda Jennings
characters.description: Amanda JenningsCharacter InformationGenderFemale Amanda Jenningswas one ofBilly Kincaid's victims. Amanda Jennings was the eight-year-old daughter of SenatorPaul Jennings. In the mid 1980s, she was murdered by Billy Kincaid, who then mutilated her corpse, which was found under the George Washington Bridge by a passing jogger. Billy was tried and convicted of murder and received a twenty-two-year sentence, of which he served only six years before being released.

characters.name: Anahita
characters.description: AnihitaCharacter InformationName of birthAnihitaSpeciesAngelGenderFemaleKnown affiliationsHeavenBehind the ScenesCreated byNeil GaimanGreg CapulloFirst appearanceAngela Vol 1 1 Anahitawas an angel and hunter who resides in the city of Elysium. After the events of Angela, she decides to no longer be an angel. She is very close friends with Kuan Yin and Angela. Anahita is first introduced in Angela Issue #1. Anahita is first seen conversing with Kuan Yin about Angela's current predicament, having been accused of wrongdoings. She and Kuan Yin decide to try and prove her innocence by visiting Saranyu for information. After some encouragement from them, Saranyu decides to help and the two learned aboutSpawnfrom the information given.

characters.name: Andrei Zlenko
characters.description: Andrei ZlenkoCharacter InformationImportant epithetsAndrei ZlenkoSpeciesHumanGenderMaleBehind the ScenesCreated byTodd McFarlaneFirst appearanceSpawn Vol 1 19 "No matter. The overseer is just a formality. Yousef is an old friend, and that friendship is worth at least this small favor." Introduced in Spawn issue #19, not much is known about him. Born in the Ukraine, Andrei Zlenko risked everything he had to come to America in1961, bringing all that he owned in shabby suitcases. Despite coming over on a Visa, Zlenko had no intentions of returning to his home-country. He gained a job working as a luggage handler at JFK International Airport and found an apartment building in Little Ukraine (Unit #301), living one floor abovePorsche MacNeil. Throughout his years in the US, he still remained good friends with fellow UkrainianYousef Volokhov. It is Andrei who allows Volokhov’s “special package” to go unnoticed – and therefore almost causes the destruction of half of New York City.

characters.name: Andrew Horne
characters.description: Andrew HorneCharacter InformationSpeciesHumanGenderMaleNotable relationshipsKaren Horne(wife) Andrew Horneis a character inSpawn. The husband ofKaren Horneand the neighbor ofWanda Blake. He is first seen in Spawn issue #23 and is revealed to be an illegal immigrant. Despite his friendship withWanda, theMafiamade certain he wouldn’t ‘squeal’ after the incident whereTerrywas accused of the murder of twoFBIagents on his front lawn.

Look at the hardware they're packin'! Better call in, Phil!" - Andy An elderlyfederal Bureau of Investigationagent who, along withPhil, is placed in charge of watchingTerry Fitzgerald’s home. He is first seen inSpawn #22before being killed in a shoot-off with the mob shortly after.

characters.name: Andy Frank
characters.description: Andy FrankCharacter InformationImportant epithetsAndy FrankSpeciesHumanGenderMaleNotable relationshipsEddie Frank(brother),Joe Frank(father)Behind the ScenesCreated byNeil GaimanTodd McFarlaneGreg CapulloFirst appearanceAngela Vol 1 1 "Hey, mister. Bet you're gonna get in big trouble for gettin' all dirty like that." - Andy Frank Andy Frank is a young boy from Alabama who is first introduced inAngela #3, and reprises his role inSpawn #29. AfterSpawn'sbattle in Heaven and in Hell, he is severely weakened, and Andy does his best to help. Andy's father,Joe Frank, beats him often, as shown by the scars on the rear inSpawn #29, but he has his older brother,Eddie Frank, to stick up for him.

characters.name: Angela
characters.description: AngelaCharacter InformationName of birthAngelaSpeciesAngelGenderFemaleKnown affiliationsHeavenGuardians of the GalaxyOccupationHellspawnhunterCurrent statusDeceasedBehind the ScenesCreated byNeil GaimanTodd McFarlaneFirst appearanceSpawn #9(March 1993) Angelais an angel and a hunter ofHellspawn. She is first introduced inSpawnissue #9 and is the firstAngelto be introduced in the series. A beautiful woman, fit with long red locks and a perfect figure, she is a recurring character in theSpawnUniverse. Albeit cocky, she is very, very good at what she does. In her first appearance, her story introducesSpawn #9as she is shown in a time 800 years past where she has disguising herself as a distressed maiden. When the knightlyMedieval Hellspawnpasses by on his steed he offers help. Angela explains that she has been in an encounter with an ogre and the creature took her sister back to its cave under the waterfall. With eagerness theHellspawngallops across the glen to the supposed cave. Angela insists on following him inside as she is ‘familiar with the cavern’. When they are deep in its crevices, she transforms and initiates combat with the knight in a formidable battle. In the end, with the help of herDimensional Lance, she is able to kill the Hellspawn and collect her trophy.[1]

characters.name: Anne Thomopoulos
characters.description: Anne Thomopoulos Anne is a neighbour ofWanda Blake's. She is first seen in Spawn issue #23 and is revealed to have had a son out of wedlock when she was 17, who is now jailed. His parole is coming up in 2 months and she has been promised his freedom. This is why, despite her friendship withWanda, theMafiamade certain she wouldn’t ‘squeal’ after the incident whereTerrywas accused of the murder of twoFBIagents on his front lawn.

characters.name: Antonio Twistelli
characters.description: Antonio Carlo TwistelliCharacter InformationName of birthAntonio Carlo TwistelliImportant epithetsTony TwistVito GravanoDon DraculaSpeciesHumanGenderMalePlace of birthVillalbaKnown affiliationsNew York MafiaNotable relationshipsBernardo Twistelli (brother)OccupationCrimelordBehind the ScenesCreated byTodd McFarlaneFirst appearanceSpawn #6 Antonio "Tony Twist" Twistelli, also known asVito Gravano, is a New York Mafia boss in New York City. Tony was born and raised in Villalba, Sicily as was the youngest son of a poor family of farmers. Despite this, he ascended in the clergy due to family connections. However, Antonio was more ambitious, and his thirst for money and power led him to join gangs in Sicily. He soon gained a reputation for violence and intelligence. This caught the attention of the Sicilian Mafia head, and he had Antonio sent to America at age 18 under the name Tony Twist to continue criminal activities in another country.

characters.name: Avenging Angel of the Fifth Heaven
characters.description: Avenging Angel of the Fifth Heaven TheAvenging Angel of the Fifth Heavenis an angel fromHeaven. During the creation of the first seenAnti-Spawn, this angel was contacted by theOrbital Angel Stationto arrange for the transfer ofElemental Fireto the body ofJason Wynn.

characters.name: Badrock
characters.description: Thomas John McCallCharacter InformationName of birthThomas John McCallImportant epithetsBadrockSpeciesHuman (Mutated)GenderMalePlace of birthBaltimore, MarylandNotable relationshipsJoseph McCall (father), Angela McCall (mother)Behind the ScenesCreated byRob LiefeldFirst appearanceYoungblood #1 "Right in the middle of my best game ever!! It couldn't have broken yesterday when I couldn't do dick!" - Badrock Badrock – formerly named Bedrock but changed to avoid legal disputes with Hanna-Barbera Productions – is a member ofYoungblood. Originally known asThomas McCall, he transformed into Badrock at the age of 16 when he swallows top-secret genetic material in his father’s lab. His first appearance in the Spawn comic book series is in issue #13 as he has hooked up a video game to one of the Youngbloods’ video equipment modules. He is seen to be a giant, golem-like creature standing at about 8’ tall with incredible strength. Despite his brute size and rock-hard exterior, Badrock is known to have a heart of gold and is never seen in action in the Spawn comics. Badrock ‘does’ however make regular appearances in theYoungblood seriesofImage Comics.

characters.name: Beelzebub
characters.description: BeelzebubCharacter InformationImportant epithetsAmon's HandLord of the FliesGenderFemaleBehind the ScenesFirst appearanceShadows of Spawn Vol. 1, Episode 2: The Intrigue Beelzebub, also known asBee, is a demon that appears in the mangaShadows of Spawn. It is later revealed that she's the younger sister ofMalebolgia,[1]but due to the manga ceasing production their relationship is never expounded on any further.

characters.name: Bernie
characters.description: Bernie"Burn a bum....hur hur hur!" - Bernie Bernie is a character who makes and appearance in issue #16 of the Spawn comic books. He along with one of his friends, are going around the alleyways ofNew York Citythreatening to kill bums by burning them alive with a jerry-can of gasoline and a Zippo. As they are in the midst of intimidating one of the homeless men,Spawnarrives to teach them a lesson. While using none of his powers,Spawnstill makes easy work of the two boys, breaking Bernie’s hand in the process. Nothing is heard from of these two afterwards, but it is assumed that their behaviour has changed for the better.

characters.name: Billy
characters.description: Billy"B-but...the money..." - Billy Billy is introduced in Spawn Blood Feud Issue #1. It is assumed that he is a criminal. He is one of the victims ofK7-Leetha.

characters.name: Billy Kincaid
characters.description: Billy KincaidCharacter InformationImportant epithetsBilly KincaidSpeciesHumanGenderMaleKnown affiliationsThe HellNotable relationshipsMalebolgia(lord)Behind the ScenesCreated byTodd McFarlaneFirst appearanceSpawn Vol 1 5 William "Billy" Kincaidis a recurring antagonist inSpawn. Billy Kincaid is a deranged child-killer and pedophile in theSpawnuniverse. He is first introduced in Issue #5 of the comic book series and we learn that he had been accused of the brutal murder of eight year old,Amanda Jennings– daughter of SenatorPaul Jennings. Originally sentenced to 22 years in prison, his good behaviour, great attorneyJeff Pittmanand a positive psychiatric evaluation from theWindgate Institutionin New York City has allowed him early parole – making him a free man after only 6 years.

characters.name: Billy Kincaid

characters.name: Billy Miller
characters.description: Billy Miller"Speaking of cooking, why waste those beautiful lips on food, when I can think of a number of things I'd much rather see them do." - Billy Miller This employee of theCIA New York Headquartersis only seen in Spawn issue #3. He is a man of low morals and is seen sexually harassing his secretaryLinda.Spawnmakes a quick stop to retrieve some files on his former wifeWanda, and overhears the conversation between Billy and his secretary. Enraged he does a quick check-up on Billy’s file and gets the dirt. Upon entering his office room, Billy is confronted bySpawnwho states that the divorcee has not paid a cent in child support or alimony, and if he continues with this ‘bad behaviour’ his ex-wife will be collecting the money from his life insurance.  Nothing is heard about Billy in the later issues but it is assumed that he smartened up.

characters.name: Bludd
characters.description: BluddCharacter InformationSpeciesVampireGenderMale Bluddis a character inSpawn. A vampire lord who lusts after power but is willing to be patient over the course of centuries to obtain it.

characters.name: Bob
characters.description: Bob"Bob! Don't go near it! That isn't the king!" - Billy Kincaid Bob is  fat middle-aged man from Wisconsin who befriendsBilly Kincaidin Spawn issue #8. He is introduced withKimberly,Larry,Claudetteand littleJessica. It is revealed that the last thing he remembers is listening to “An American Trilogy” and running his pick-up under a Peterbilt before awakening in the orchard. He is the third to depart the group after mistaking aCthugan Metabusewith Elvis.

characters.name: Bob (NYC Police)
characters.description: Bob (NYC Police)Character InformationSpeciesHumanGenderMaleKnown affiliationsNew York Police DepartmentBehind the ScenesFirst appearanceSpawn #35 Bobis a character inSpawn. Bob is a member of the New York City Police Department and is only seen briefly in Spawn Issue #35. He advises detectivesSam BurkeandTwitch Williamsthat ChiefLouis Bankshas gone to the alleyways with bothSmithandJensento confrontSpawn.

characters.name: Bobbie
characters.description: BobbieCharacter InformationImportant epithetsBobbieSpeciesHumanGenderMaleBehind the ScenesCreated byTodd McFarlaneFirst appearanceSpawn Vol 1 11 Bobbieis a character inSpawn. Bobbie makes his debut appearance in Spawn Issue #11, and is one of the homeless men who live in the Bowery of New York City. He is mentioned to have "Jurassic Farts" because of how bad they smell. He is not mentioned again after this issue.

characters.name: Bobby
characters.description: BobbyCharacter InformationImportant epithetsBobbySpeciesHumanGenderMaleBehind the ScenesCreated byTodd McFarlaneGreg CapulloFirst appearanceSpawn Vol 1 7 "Big, bad Bobby saves the day once again! You know, if I wasn't such a loser, I'd think I was a winner!" - Bobby It should also be noted that Bobby also has his name spelled 'Bobbie' in the series, not to be confused with the other homeless man namedBobbie.
